https://www.thinkgeoenergy.com/infrastru.title: Infrastructure work completed in preparation of geothermal drilling in Mataloko, Indonesia
https://www.thinkgeoenergy.com/infrastru.plain_summary: Infrastructure work has been finished at the Mataloko geothermal project in Indonesia, preparing the site for the drilling phase—the process of creating holes in the ground to access hot rock deep below the surface. PT PLN, an Indonesian energy company, is leading this project to harness geothermal energy.

https://www.thinkgeoenergy.com/omv-and-e.title: OMV and Energie Steiermark announce joint geothermal project in Graz, Austria
https://www.thinkgeoenergy.com/omv-and-e.plain_summary: Two companies, OMV and Energie Steiermark, have partnered to develop a geothermal heating project in Graz, Austria. Geothermal heating uses hot rock underground to provide warmth to buildings. They plan to start exploration drilling—the process of making holes deep into the earth to find and assess hot rock resources—by the end of 2026.

https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBM.title: Fervo Energy Adapts Oil Drilling Techniques to Develop Universal Geothermal Energy Solution - CPG Click Oil and Gas
https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBM.plain_summary: Fervo Energy is using techniques borrowed from the oil and gas industry to develop geothermal energy from superhot rock deep underground. By adapting proven drilling methods, the company aims to create a geothermal solution that can work almost anywhere, making it easier to tap into Earth's heat as a renewable energy source.
